raw_text:
Yes — proceed with Phase 17 execution using the exact first-wave assignment you listed.

✅ Approved first wave (3-way parallel)

Agent 1 → bd-17s0 (platform/projections scaffolding)

Agent 2 → bd-17s1 (platform/audit scaffolding)

Agent 3 → bd-17s2 (platform/tenant-registry scaffolding)

Hard constraints for these 3 scaffolding beads

Each agent must deliver:

New crate directory + Cargo.toml + src/lib.rs

Root workspace Cargo.toml updated (members)

cargo test --workspace passes

No business logic, no migrations, no endpoints, no cross-module imports

Immediately after those merge

Start the next unlocked P0 foundations in parallel:

bd-17a0 (projection cursor contract)

bd-17b0 (audit append-only schema + writer API)

bd-17c0 (tenant registry schema baseline)

“Stop-the-line” checks (don’t skip)

Before moving from scaffolding → foundation beads, confirm:

New crates have no dependency on module crates (AR/Payments/etc.)

CI lints still pass (boundary + raw pool + metadata checks)

Workspace build time didn’t explode due to accidental feature flags or heavy deps

Green light granted.
